name: Good Old Days
original_name: ร้านซื้อขายความทรงจำ
overview: In an antique shop, the value of each item is the story behind them. People who sell their belongings here can reminisce on their lives, and buyers see their value hidden within. Six stories about memories, love, dreams and separation are linked to six items.

trailers.title: [Official Trailer] Good Old Days ร้านซื้อขายความทรงจำ
